titleStmt.title: SII 23.164: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 164. (A.R. No. 164 of 1907.) Pēraiyūr, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Nāganāthasvāmi temple—on the same wall

summary.p: The first two lines are dated in the 33rd year of the same king (Kulaśēkhara) as above, after which there is a gap making it doubtful whether the subsequent lines are part of this record. They seem to register a tax-free sale of seven pieces of land including Nakkanēri-Vayal and Pudarkkuḍikkāḍu by several individuals to the temple, and the grant of the lease of these lands on permanent tenure to the same Tirupperunduṟaippiḷḷai mentioned above (in No. 163) on similar rental basis of payment by the lessee to the temple according to the nature of crops raised.

The names of the taxes on the lands remitted are given as araśuvari, antarāyam, veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ, pañjupīli, śanduvigrahappēṟu, echchōṟu, kūṟṟariśi, śilvari, peruvari and kīḻvārappachchai, and these were agreed to be paid on behalf of the temple by the sellers. Though the transaction is called a ‘sale’ the price of the lands is not specified.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟupaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya
śrī kulacekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 3vatu kāṉaṉāṭāṉa virutārājabhayaṅkara vaḷaṉāṭṭu devatāṉabrā blank space After this
ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum muṭiyaṉperumāḷāṉa Uttamacoḻa nāṭāḻvāṉuḷ ḷiṭṭārum Añcātāṉ ṉaraṅkaṉp perumāḷum villi viramaḻakiyate
va ṉuḷḷiṭṭārum Aracu cokkaṉāruḷaḷiṭṭārum māmukil mum Uṭai yār tirunāgiśvaramuṭaiya nāyanāṟku Iṟaiili deva
r tāṉamākavum Ivaṟku kuṭiṉiṅkātevartāṉamāka pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷūrp pāṟpāṉkuḷam putarkkuṭi
kuḷamum vayalum caṟupputarkkuṭikkuḷamum vayalum koṭṭiyūr ṉāṭāḻ vāṉ kuṭikkāṭṭuk kuḷamum vayalum malaicaiyarāyaṉ kuṭikkāṭu
m Ikkuḷamum vayalum tattaṉerikuḷattil Iṉṉāyanār paḻantevatāṉam tirunāgiśvaravayakkalukku viṭṭa muṉṟattoṉṟu ṉikki Ivaṟ
ku viṟṟa nakkaṉeri vayalum Ikkuḷattiṟ cempāti putarkkuṭikkāṭṭuk kum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai peraiyūriṉiṉṟum ka
mpaṉvayalukku varukiṟa vaḻikkum kaṭampaṉkuḷattukku ṉāñci kuṭik kāṭṭuk kuḷattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Uyyāṇṭi vayakka lāṉa pa
laiyāvatu kuṭivayakkal teṉvarampileṉiṉṟu koṭṭiyūr nāṭāḻvār kuṭikkāṭṭukkut teṟku ṉā
ṉ tiruccūlatevaṟku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kiḻakke ṭāka ṉiṟkiṟa tiruccūlatevarkaḷukku kiḻa
kkum vaṭapāṟkellai tirupperaiyūr Ellaikkut teṟkum Āka Icaiynta peruṉāṉkellai
k kuṭpapaṭṭa kuṉṟukaḷum vayalkaḷum kiḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟukaḷum me ṉokkiya maraṅkaḷum mākkaḷum puṟṟun teṟṟi
puñceykaḷum Iṟaiyili kuṭiṉiṅkāt tevatāṉamāka viṟṟu Ivvayal kaḷukku varum Ara
cuvari kaṭamai Antarāyam veṭṭimuṭṭāvāḷ pañcupili cantuvikkiramap peṟu Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici cilvari peruvari
kiḻvārappaccai maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum ṉāṅkaḷe Iṟuppomākavum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Ivar kaṭamai Iṟukkumpaṭi Irupa
ttiraṭik kolāl Irunūṟṟaimpattāṟu kuḻikoṇṭatoru mā nilat tukkum payirpārttup payir koṇṭa ṉilattukku māttā
l Irupaṇamum Eḻukala nellum Aṟpacikkuṟuvaikku Ikkaṭamaiyil Oṉṟupātiyum Āṭikkuṟuvaikku Ikkaṭamaiil O
ṉṟukālum mañcaṭ karuṇai viḷainta ṉilattukkup pacāṉakkaṭamaiyum karumpu koṭikkāl viḷainta ṉilattukku kaipukkārā
ḷmutal pacāṉa payum tiṉai viḷainta ṉilattukku Ikkaṭamaiil Oṉṟu kālum Eḷḷup payiṟu viḷainta ṉilattukku mā
ttāl tūṇi Eḷḷum payaṟu mutalaip pūcaṇi viḷainta ṉilattukku māt tāl Orupaṇamum Āka Ivvakaippaṭi vanta kaṭamai Ikko
ilpaṇṭāratte yaḷantu tāṉattār kaiyyāṟ taravu koḷḷakkaṭavarāka vum Ippaṭi candrādittavarai Aṉupavippārākavum
Ippaṭi cammatittuk kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom Ikkoyil tāṉatto mum Araiyarkaḷomu maṟamutalikaḷomum Itu tirupperu
ntuṟaippiḷḷaikku Ivai tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉeḻuttu(m) puvaṉi nārāyaṇabrahmātarāyaṉeḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiyaṉampi ye
ḻuttu virakkaḻalaḻakiyapaṭṭaṉeḻuttu ṉeḻuttu murukāṇṭāṉuḷ ḷiṭṭā reḻuttu Uttamacoḻa
Eḻuttu Eḻuttu malaicaiyarāyaṉeḻuttu viramaḻakiyatevaṉuḷ ḷiṭṭār
caimāṇikka peraiyaṉeḻuttu camaiyamāṇikkap pe
peraiya ṉeḻuttu perumāḷ muṭiya ṉeḻuttu
Eḻuttu Ūṟkaṇakkuṅ koyil kaṇakkumāṉa teṉṉavataraiya ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
